summary: Iteration 17 - Complete Testing of Menu Engineering Matrix, POS Connector, GL Sync, and Dashboard Bug Fix. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 new panels load correctly, sidebar entries visible, dashboard bug fix verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Menu Engineering Matrix correctly classifies items into Stars/Plowhorses/Puzzles/Dogs based on median margin and orders
POS Connector supports 5 systems (Toast, Aloha, Micros, Square, Clover) with connection management and sync
GL Sync supports 3 platforms (QuickBooks, Sage, Xero) with account mappings and journal sync
Dashboard bug fix verified: LUCCCA Dashboard now opens 'Enterprise Command Center' (panelId='dashboard') instead of Maestro BQT
Sidebar.tsx correctly registers Menu Engineering under Core Operations, POS Connector and GL Sync under Financial & Supply
All frontend panels use data-testid attributes for testing
POS and GL sync operations are MOCKED (simulated) - no real external API calls

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All panels load, forms work, dashboard bug fixed)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed POS connections and GL connections during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified all new features: 1) Menu Engineering Matrix API returns 11 items with classifications (6 stars, 5 plowhorses, 0 puzzles, 0 dogs), 2) POS Connector shows 5 POS systems with connection management, test, and sync functionality, 3) GL Sync shows 3 platforms with connection management, account mappings, and journal sync, 4) Dashboard bug fix verified - LUCCCA Dashboard opens Enterprise Command Center not Maestro BQT. GL Sync panel initially failed to load due to Vite module caching but worked after frontend restart. Test data created with TEST_ prefix.

backend_tests.health_endpoint: PASS - Returns healthy status, version 3.1, 10 engines active
backend_tests.menu_engineering_overview: PASS - Returns quick counts per quadrant
backend_tests.pos_systems: PASS - Returns 5 POS systems (toast, aloha, micros, square, clover)
backend_tests.pos_connection_create: PASS - Creates new connection with pending_verification status
backend_tests.pos_connection_test: PASS - Tests connection, returns connected status with 42ms latency
backend_tests.pos_sync: PASS - Triggers sync, returns records_synced count
backend_tests.gl_connection_create: PASS - Creates new connection with pending_auth status
backend_tests.gl_connection_activate: PASS - Activates connection, returns active status
backend_tests.gl_account_mapping: PASS - Adds account mapping between LUCCCA and external codes
backend_tests.gl_sync_journals: PASS - Syncs journal entries, returns entries_synced, total_debits, total_credits
backend_tests.gl_sync_inactive_400: PASS - Returns 400 for inactive connection sync attempt
backend_tests.gl_activate_404: PASS - Returns 404 for nonexistent connection activation

frontend_tests.sidebar_loads: PASS - All sections visible, Menu Engineering under Core Operations, POS Connector and GL Sync under Financial & Supply
frontend_tests.dashboard_bug_fix: PASS - LUCCCA Dashboard opens 'Enterprise Command Center' (not Maestro BQT)
frontend_tests.menu_engineering_panel: PASS - Panel loads with 6 Stars, 5 Plowhorses, 0 Puzzles, 0 Dogs, 11 items in table
frontend_tests.menu_engineering_filters: PASS - Filter buttons (star, plowhorse, puzzle, dog) and summary cards visible
frontend_tests.pos_connector_panel: PASS - Panel loads with 5 POS system cards (Toast, Aloha, Micros, Square, Clover)
frontend_tests.pos_connector_form: PASS - Add Connection form opens with system select, display name, location ID fields
frontend_tests.pos_connector_connections: PASS - Shows existing connections with Sync buttons and sync history
frontend_tests.gl_sync_panel: PASS - Panel loads with dashboard summary (2 Active, 2 Mappings, 8 GL Codes, 21 Journal Entries)
frontend_tests.gl_sync_connections: PASS - Shows 3 connections (LUCCCA Resort LLC, TEST_LUCCCA Resort LLC, TEST_Inactive Company)
frontend_tests.gl_sync_buttons: PASS - Mappings and Sync Journals buttons visible on active connections, Activate button on inactive

mocked_apis_list: POS sync (returns menu_items count from DB)
GL journal sync (sums actual GL entries from DB, no real QuickBooks/Sage API calls)
